Privacy
Home/Referral Partner Program

Referral Partner Program

Become an Opticable referral partner.

This program is for businesses and professionals who can refer multiple qualified projects. Applications are reviewed first, and the partner account is created only after approval.

Apply as a Referral PartnerOpen the portal

This program is best if...

Referral Partner Program

You are a business contact, trade, consultant, integrator, or property-side partner sending repeat opportunities.

  • Built for businesses and repeat referrers
  • Application and approval are required
  • No automatic client discount is promised in this program
  • Payouts follow fixed project-size tiers after completion and payment
See the Referral Program
Referral ProgramFor clients and contacts who want future Opticable credit.Referral Partner ProgramFor businesses and professionals sending repeat referrals.Referral PortalReview your code, share link, referrals, and rewards.Request a quoteUse your referral code in the quote request.

Referral Partner Program

How it works

Partners submit an application first. After approval, Opticable creates the account, the code, and the portal access.

01

Apply for approval

Tell us who you are and how you expect to refer projects.

02

Account created after approval

After approval, Opticable creates the partner account, the code, and the portal access.

03

Use the code on first contact

The new client must use the code on the first quote request.

04

Earn a payout

Payout is earned only after the referred project is completed and fully paid.

Referral Partner Program

Apply as a Referral Partner

Submit your business details for review. Opticable will validate the request first, then create the partner account if approved.

Go to the portal

Referral Program

Referral Program

You want a simple referral setup with future Opticable credit instead of a commercial payout.

  • A referred client gets 5% off, up to CAD 1,000 per quote
  • You earn 3% in Opticable credit, up to CAD 1,000 per completed project
  • Credits accumulate in one balance for future Opticable work
  • The eligible project subtotal must be at least CAD 5,000 before taxes
  • A maximum of CAD 1,000 in credit can be applied to one quote or project
See the Referral ProgramRequest a quote

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Important points before you apply.

Who should use this version?

IT providers, trades, consultants, property contacts, and businesses sending repeat referrals.

What does the referred client get?

This program does not promise an automatic discount to the referred client.

What do I get?

A fixed payout after completion and payment: CAD 150 from 5,000 to 9,999.99, CAD 400 from 10,000 to 24,999.99, CAD 750 from 25,000 to 49,999.99, and CAD 1,250 from 50,000 and up.

When is the payout earned?

Only after the referred project is completed and fully paid.

Do I get a portal?

Yes, but only after the application is approved and the partner account is created.

How do I withdraw a commission?

Contact Opticable to confirm the amount to settle. Once the transfer is sent, Opticable marks the commission as settled in your portal.

Read the terms

Opticable installs and supports cameras, access, WiFi, intercom, cabling, and network infrastructure for commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, and across Quebec.

9453-4757 Québec Inc.
Licence RBQ : 5864-1648-01

  • Quotes and inquiriesMonday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM: by phone, email, or form
  • WeekendsSaturday and Sunday, 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM: by email or form only
  • Technical supportMonday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM · Saturday and Sunday, 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM
